description_long: This is a handheld electric grinder with a robust cylindrical body, primarily colored green with black and gray accents. The device features a prominent side handle for stability, a main grip with a visible power button, and a protective safety guard partially covering the grinding disc. The grinding disc is mounted at the front, with the disc and guard assembly extending outward. A power cord extends from the rear, indicating it is a corded electric tool. The overall design is ergonomic, with textured grips and a compact, durable construction suitable for heavy-duty urban or workshop use.
description: A green and black handheld electric grinder with a side handle, safety guard, and visible grinding disc, designed for ergonomic use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main body, side handle, power button, and safety guard over the grinding disc.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular grinding disc, safety guard, and the vertical side handle above the disc.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body, side handle, and the full extent of the safety guard and disc.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the power cord, vented motor housing, and the alignment of the handle and body.
attribute_handle_design: The grinder has two handles: a main rear handle integrated into the body with a textured grip and a trigger switch, and a cylindrical auxiliary side handle mounted above the grinding disc for added control.
